articles.title: Erode sizzles at 40°C as heat wave disrupts daily life, campaigning and livelihoods - The Hindu
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Tamil Nadu
articles.full_text:
With intense heat prevailing, street vendors are increasingly taking shelter under umbrellas to continue their daily businesses in Erode in Tamil Nadu on Tuesday.
| Photo Credit: GOVARTHAN M.
Most parts of the district are reeling under an intense heat wave, with temperatures already touching 40 degrees Celsius and humidity levels rising steadily, making daily life increasingly difficult. The scorching conditions are affecting people from all walks of life, including traders and political campaigners, who are struggling to continue their activities under the relentless sun.
With just a week left for campaigning to end ahead of the April 23 Assembly election, political parties are also finding it difficult to extend their campaign hours to reach the remaining voters, as the intense heat restricts outdoor activities during the day.
Published - April 14, 2026 06:37 pm IST
